whyItMatters: For startup teams, the key question is whether this turns into better products, faster execution, or stronger collaboration.

title: Trump orders government, Fed to review crypto firms' access to payment rails
summary: Donald Trump's executive order asks the Fed to review how depository institutions may be granted access to payment services, an area the crypto industry is deeply involved with.
whyItMatters: In Web3, the stronger signals usually come from concrete launches, ecosystem integrations, and real user utility rather than narrative alone.

title: LaunchVic is dead. Long live Innovation Victoria
summary: Meet Innovation Victoria, the new agency replacing both LaunchVic and Breakthrough Victoria under a major Victorian government shake-up.
whyItMatters: For startup teams, the key question is whether this turns into better products, faster execution, or stronger collaboration.
